data_range.note: Initial structure - populate with real PR review data from Linux kernel repository

common_issues.description: Using manual allocation/deallocation instead of device-managed resources
common_issues.example: Use devm_kzalloc(), devm_ioremap_resource(), devm_request_irq() instead of manual cleanup

common_issues.description: Calling functions that may sleep while holding spinlocks or in interrupt context
common_issues.example: Don't call mutex_lock(), msleep(), or I2C/SPI functions inside spin_lock() or interrupt handlers

common_issues.description: Returning positive errors or using wrong errno codes
common_issues.example: Return negative errno: -EINVAL, -ENOMEM, -EIO, not positive values

common_issues.description: Code doesn't pass checkpatch.pl --strict checks
common_issues.example: Fix alignment, spacing, line length, comment style per kernel coding standards

common_issues.description: Allocated resources not freed when function exits via error path
common_issues.example: Use goto error handling pattern and free resources in reverse order

common_issues.description: Functions don't document locking requirements or use wrong lock type
common_issues.example: Document which lock must be held with __must_hold(), use spin_lock_irqsave() in IRQ paths

common_issues.issue: Missing or incorrect DT binding validation
common_issues.description: Device tree bindings not validated with dt_binding_check or have schema errors
common_issues.example: Run 'make dt_binding_check' and fix YAML schema errors

common_issues.description: Device tree node references not released or released incorrectly
common_issues.example: Call of_node_put() for each of_node_get(), of_find_*, of_parse_phandle()

common_issues.description: Suspend/resume callbacks don't handle errors properly
common_issues.example: Check return values from clk_prepare_enable(), regulator_enable() in resume

common_issues.description: Device registered before fully initialized or removed after cleanup started
common_issues.example: Register device as last step in probe, unregister as first step in remove

common_issues.description: Using GFP_KERNEL in atomic context or GFP_ATOMIC unnecessarily
common_issues.example: Use GFP_ATOMIC only in interrupt handlers or under spinlocks, GFP_KERNEL elsewhere

common_issues.description: User input from ioctl, sysfs not validated for bounds/sanity
common_issues.example: Validate array indices, check for integer overflow, sanitize string inputs

common_issues.description: Exported functions lack proper kernel-doc format documentation
common_issues.example: Add /** kernel-doc */ with @param and Return: for all EXPORT_SYMBOL functions

common_issues.description: Using old/deprecated kernel APIs instead of current ones
common_issues.example: Use devm_platform_ioremap_resource() not platform_get_resource() + devm_ioremap()

common_issues.description: Deferred probing return value not handled properly
common_issues.example: Return -EPROBE_DEFER when resources not ready, don't convert to other errno

common_issues.description: Multiple locks acquired in inconsistent order, risking ABBA deadlock
common_issues.example: Always acquire locks in same order, document lock hierarchy

common_issues.issue: Hardcoded values instead of DT properties
common_issues.description: Configuration values hardcoded that should be in device tree
common_issues.example: Move board-specific values (GPIO numbers, addresses, etc.) to DT properties

common_issues.description: Checking for NULL when function returns ERR_PTR or vice versa
common_issues.example: Use IS_ERR() + PTR_ERR() for functions returning error pointers, NULL check for others

common_issues.description: IIO channel specs missing required fields or using wrong types
common_issues.example: Set scan_type.realbits, .storagebits, .shift correctly for IIO channels

common_issues.description: Type casts that are redundant or hide real type issues
common_issues.example: Remove unnecessary void* casts, fix actual type mismatches

common_issues.description: Kconfig doesn't declare all required dependencies
common_issues.example: Add 'depends on SPI', 'select REGMAP_SPI' for all required subsystems

common_issues.description: Using custom register I/O when regmap would be more appropriate
common_issues.example: Consider using regmap API for register access (caching, debugging, etc.)

common_issues.description: Errors not logged, making debugging difficult
common_issues.example: Use dev_err(), dev_warn() to log error conditions with context

common_issues.description: User-controlled strings used directly in printf-style functions
common_issues.example: Use dev_err(dev, '%s', user_str) not dev_err(dev, user_str)

common_issues.issue: Inefficient loops or memory access patterns
common_issues.description: Code could be optimized for better performance
common_issues.example: Consider bulk operations, DMA, or caching for performance-critical paths

common_issues: Not using iio_priv() to get private data
Using platform_get_resource + devm_ioremap instead of devm_platform_ioremap_resource
Not setting spi_device mode/bits_per_word in probe
Incorrect SPI transfer setup (missing length, data pointer, etc.)
Using i2c_transfer instead of i2c_smbus_* helpers when appropriate

automated_checks: Build with W=1 for extra warnings
